calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2004 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-08-2004 Continued To Nov-15-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:KAREN UCHIYAMA FOR PLAINTIFF STEPHEN BUTLER ALSO PRESENT.
DEFENDANTS KAREN CHAVEZ AND GEORGE ESCOBAR CHAVEA AKA GEORGE CHAVEA IN PRO PER

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE TENTATIVELY SETTLED. TERMS READ INTO RECORD.
DEFENDANTS TO VACATE PROPERTY AT 121 SAN CARLOS STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, 94110 BY 1/2/05. KEYS TO BE TURNED OVER TO PLAINTIFF OR PLAINTIFFS ATTORNEY BY NOON 1/3/05.
DEFENDANTS MAY REMAIN ON PROPERTY TO 1/2/05 IF CONSIDERATION, NOT RENT, IS PAID AS FOLLOWS:
$500 BY 9AM 11/8/04 AND $800 BY 12/1/04.
IF DEFENDANTS VACATE TIMELY, PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. EACH PARTY TO BEAR OWN ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS.
JUDGMENT IS IMMEDIATE IF DEFENDANTS BECOME A NUISANCE; VANDALIZE; SUBLET; OR NOT ALLOW PLAINTIFF ACCESS TO INSPECT PROPERTY UPON 24HOUR NOTICE.
DEFENDANTS HAVE REQUESTED TIME TO HAVE THEIR COUNSEL REVIEW THE SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
THEREFORE THE TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:MICHAEL RAIFSNIDER; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; REPORTER:KAREN FARNSWORTH(218)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
Off Calendar Nov-03-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Karen Y. Uchiyama, Esq., (415) 274-2033, for Plaintiff and Moving Party Stephen Butler
Defendants Karen Chavez and George Chavez, (415) 368-2559, appeared in Propria Persona
RULING:
A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF STEPHEN BUTLER'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: DENIED; for failure to provide valid Proof of Service. Declaration of Service was not proper. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
